title: CareHabitat by Dr. Urvi Sheth | Best Cardiac Rehabilitation Programs - Rehab Centre in Mumbai
heading: Telerehab: Bringing Rehabilitation to Your Homes
description: CareHabitat offers a specialized cardiac, pulmonary and geriatric rehabilitation program to help individuals improve their ability to function and increase their physical endurance, enhance their ability to perform daily living skills, reduce lifestyle-related risks, and increase knowledge of disease and prevention.

Find Your Answer We are a highly rated Cardio-Respiratory Rehab Centre If you have had a recent heart attack, surgery or procedure, we can help you regain your strength. We provide a supervised and monitored exercise program designed to prepare patients with heart disease for an active and productive lifestyle , and to prevent further illness. Read about us Read more Cardiac Rehabilitation Cardiac Rehabilitation is a comprehensive program designed to prepare patients with heart disease for an active and productive lifestyle. A structured cardiac rehabilitation program... Read more Explore Pulmonary Rehabilitation Pulmonary rehabilitation, also known as respiratory rehabilitation, or lungs rehabilitation is an important part of health maintenance of people with a respiratory disease such as... Explore Find out More Geriatric Rehabilitation Geriatrics is the branch of medicine that focuses on health care of the elderly. Our Geriatric Rehabilitation program aims at promoting health and to prevent diseases and disabilities... Find out More About CareHabitat CareHabitat offers a specialized cardiac, pulmonary, and geriatric rehabilitation program to help individuals improve their ability to function and increase their physical endurance, enhance their ability to perform daily living skills, reduce lifestyle-related risks, and increase knowledge of disease and prevention. At Carehabitat , to help you achieve your health goals, we evaluate your physical capabilities and limitations and develop a rehabilitation program tailored specifically to your needs. The Founder Dr. Urvi Sheth MPT (CardioRespiratory Sciences) Dr. Urvi Sheth is a Specialized Rehabilitation Physical Therapist with a Masters degree in Cardiorespiratory Sciences. She started CareHabitat in 2015... Read More Your treatment is incomplete without cardiac rehabilitation. Schedule an Appointment Client Testimonials Previous Next “I am very happy with the rehabilitation treatment I am receiving at Carehabitat! When I enrolled for the program, I could hardly walk for sometime and would get breathless and have chest heaviness. But with regularizing my exercise routine here, and that too under medical supervision, I can exercise confidently without any fear or complaints now! I enjoy my workout sessions at Carehabitat! Thank you Dr. Urvi” Mr. Naresh Lalji Coronary Artery Bypass Surgery in 2002 "I have been exercising at Carehabitat and have seen a lot of good change in my lifestyle. Not only has my weight reduced, but my heart rate and diabetes readings have also shown improvements. Dr. Urvi is extremely caring and considerate towards her patients, especially those with severe health issues. I would highly recommend her to everyone who needs rehabilitation services." Mrs. Rita Desai Angioplasty in September, 2015 “My rehabilitation experience as a whole has been truly encouraging, under the watchful guidance of Dr. Urvi. She is so attentive and kind towards her patients, and the way the entire program was carried out, I never faced any inconvenience. I believe the fast recovery in my overall health was due to her dedication. The positive vibration of the clinic is so energetic and can be easily felt. I feel as energetic as before, post the completion of the rehabilitation program. May God bless her and I wish her a bright future!” Mr. Himanshu Kale Coronary Artery Bypass Surgery in December, 2016 “I have been with Dr. Urvi for my rehabilitation program and I am extremely happy and satisfied with my recovery. With her professional experience, I have been back to my regular routine. I, being a fitness freak wanted to get back to running as soon as possible and under Dr. Urvi’s supervision l have been able to do it in no time!” Mr. Mukesh Gandhi Angioplasty in January 2017 “I joined Cardiac Rehabilitation Program at Carehabitat with Dr. Urvi post my bypass surgery on firm recommendation of my cardiac surgeon Dr. Sanjeev Vichare. I was facing overweight problems pre and post surgery and was weighing 119kgs on the day of joining the rehabilitation program. The journey of my sessions commenced with several hurdles. Dr. Urvi’s firm determination, positive and sporting attitude and her skillful, disciplined and attentive approach made my sessions energetic and interesting, which encouraged me to push myself towards positivity after every progressive session. The impossible recovery started showing positive results! Dr. Urvi’s Rehabilitation Centre is equipped with the best and comfortable equipment, with an environment having a positive vibration. My best wishes are always with her for her progress and future endeavors. God bless her." Mr. K. Rajshekar Bypass Surgery, 17th March, 2018 “I had acute myocardial attack on 26th January, 2018. My cardiologist recommended Cardiac Rehabilitation at Carehabitat with usual medicines. I have undergone Cardiac Rehab with Dr. Urvi at her rehab clinic. To my surprise, not only did I improve my cardiac tolerance, but also got psychological and emotional confidence and better endurance. I strongly recommend Cardiac Rehabilitation at Carehabitat." Dr. Kirti Mehta Coronary Angioplasty, 26th January, 2018 “I attended the Cardiac Rehabilitation Program at Carehabitat post my Bypass surgery. I was impressed with the serene and clean surrounding of the clinic and the loving, caring, personalized attention of Dr. Urvi. I followed her advice of performing deep breathing exercises, warm up and cool down exercises and the walking protocol. I attended the World Heart Day celebrations at Carehabitat on the 29th September, 2017 and she has been her caring self and has advised me to do some muscle strengthening exercises for increasing my muscle strength and to continue my walking regimen. I just had my tests done post 6 months of the surgery, and I am very happy to say they are all normal.” Mrs. Parimala Subramanian Bypass Surgery, 13th March, 2017 “I attended the Cardiac Rehabilitation Program at Carehabitat with Dr. Urvi post an Aortic Valve Replacement with Bypass Surgery. She is equipped with all the necessary gadgets and is very scientific, systematic and thorough in her approach. I found the program very helpful to regain my strength, mobility and confidence. I attended all the rehabilitation sessions recommended by her, and I hope that each patient’s experiences and inputs will help her in betterment of her career. I wish her all the very best!” Mr. Anil Mahesh Aortic Valve Replacement+ Bypass Surgery, 30th August, 2016 “After going through the trauma of heart disease post my angioplasty, I decided to enroll in Carehabitat’s Cardiac Rehabilitation Program with Dr. Urvi. I found this to be invaluable in helping me regain my fitness levels. With each session my physical well being and mobility increased. The efficiency and skills of Dr. Urvi gave me great confidence in continuing exercising at home, in between the daily sessions. I would definitely recommend the Cardiac Rehabilitation Program to everyone.  The road to recovery can be a difficult one, however, the recovery process can be greatly achieved given a positive environment, knowledge base skills and professional links. I consider it a privilege to say that in Dr. Urvi, I found these qualities to be available in abundance. Thank you once again for all your invaluable insights and for helping me achieve my lost energy and confidence once again!” Ms. Riddhi Khandelwal Coronary Angioplasty, 21st October, 2015 Our Location Visit our Location Juhu, Mumbai Give us a Call 9820122142 or 9820725142 Send us a Message urvivora87@gmail.com Opening Hours Monday 9AM - 5PM Tuesday 9AM - 5PM Wednesday 9AM - 5PM Thursday 9AM - 5PM Friday 9AM - 5PM Saturday Closed Sunday Closed Key Links Home About Us About CareHabitat About Dr. Urvi D Sheth Our Events Rehab Programs Cardiac Rehabilitation Pulmonary Rehabilitation Tele Rehabilitation Geriatric Rehabilitation FAQs Contact Us More Information Our Events Exercise Behavioral changes Education Improve Life Expectancy Live Your Life Behavioral changes Follow Us On Facebook Copyright 2018-2020 by Dr. Urvi Sheth's CareHabitat
